column1: #   - Trailing '# comments' on data lines are stripped
#   1. IP only            -> whole host is known
#   2. IP + SID           -> any instance of that SID on this IP is known
#   3. IP + SID + inst    -> only the specific instance is known
# Example rows (remove/replace with your real inventory):
# Whole-host entries: every SAP service on these IPs is already known
# SID-level entry: any instance of AED on this host is known
# SIDs discovered on the same IP will be flagged as unknown
